title: verbascum arcturus
intro: Verbascum arcturus, also known as Bear's-foot or Arctic Mule's Ear, is a flowering plant that belongs to the snapdragon family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The plant is rich in mucilage, a substance that can help to protect and heal the mucous membranes, and has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Verbascum arcturus include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health problems, including skin irritations, coughs, and colds.
